Step 4 of 4

Growth Roadmap

Personalized plan to improve your credit readiness grade

Current Grade

A-

Target Grade

A

65% progress toward A

Milestones

1

Increase Monthly Inflows by 15%

Expand B2B client base to increase average monthly UPI/bank inflows. Target: ₹3.7L/month.

Impact: High3-4 monthsEffort: Medium
2

Achieve 100% GST Filing Compliance

File pending GST returns for the current month to achieve 12/12 filing record.

Impact: High1 monthEffort: Low
3

Maintain EMI Burden Below 25%

Continue current debt management. Consider prepayment if surplus cash allows.

Impact: MediumOngoingEffort: Low
4

Hire 2 Additional Employees

Expand team to strengthen EPFO footprint and demonstrate business growth.

Impact: Medium6 monthsEffort: High
5

Digitize Invoice Management

Move to e-invoicing for all B2B transactions to improve data traceability.

Impact: Low2 monthsEffort: Low
